body_txt: The places we live/work/play in have an effect on us. These environments change us, and in fiction, we mean this literally . note Because in real life, it's far likelier that we're the ones changing the environment to suit our needs. Maybe the region is deeply infused with magic; perhaps the universe itself has a different set of natural laws; or the effects of simply existing there are that insidious — in any event, these rules are strictly enforced, the effects are ultimately unavoidable, and living in (or sometimes even just visiting) this place changes you, be it mentally or physically , and often not in subtle ways. There are three kinds of Fisher Kingdom environmental effects that are overlapping at times:  This is similar to a Genius Loci using The Virus . Though the world isn't usually possessed of an intelligence, the precision of some of the changes would logically indicate some form of intelligence at work. Compare Fisher King , in which the land changes to reflect its ruler (and/or vice versa). Also compare Medium-Shift Gag and Reaching Through the Fourth Wall . Contrast Morphic Resonance . Related to Art-ernate Universe .
